mission.title: langflow: Notify and Listen components throw error: object has no attribute 'build_results' + incompatible component inputs
mission.description: Notify and Listen components throw error: object has no attribute 'build_results' + incompatible component inputs. Users encounter: "Error building Component Notify:".

steps.title: Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your langflow installation:
```bash
pip show langflow | grep Version
langflow run --help 2>&1 | head -5
```
Look for error: `Error building Component Notify:`

steps.title: Review langflow configuration
steps.description: Notify and Listen components have Data and Text inputs that are incompatible with other nodes. This causes an `AttributeError` when building the Notify component because `build_results` was removed in a refactor but the old component code still references it.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Notify and Listen components
Confirm the issue is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test langflow to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that `Error building Component Notify:` no longer appears.

resolution.summary: Refactored the Notify and Listen components from the old format to properly handle Data input types and remove the dependency on the removed build_results attribute.

prerequisites.description: Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Optionally Docker for containerized deployment.
